title: Duplicate result using an IN operator in the WHERE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT, c FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE t3(d INTEGER, e TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(d) REFERENCES t2(a));
SELECT d FROM t3 WHERE d IN (1, 2);
key_bug_features: Duplicate result using IN operator in WHERE clause
